description: You are a Space Station Flight Controller (Thermal/Power) planning for 'High Beta' operations where the absolute solar beta angle exceeds 60 degrees. Using the ISS orbital state from ~/Desktop/iss_state_memo.txt (Epoch: 01 Jan 2026 00:00:00.000 UTCG), perform a 180-day GMAT simulation to predict the daily solar beta angle (Spacecraft.Earth.BetaAngle). The simulation requires a high-fidelity force model including Earth's oblateness (Degree and Order >= 4) and Sun/Moon point masses. Determine the maximum absolute beta angle and the total number of days spent above 60.0 degrees, recording these findings in ~/GMAT_output
